name: ninjaone-mcp
description: Every NinjaOne report, plus a local store that answers fleet-wide questions no single API call can: patch compliance, backup gaps, AV blast-radius, health, drift.

ninjaone_client_id.title: NINJAONE_CLIENT_ID
ninjaone_client_id.description: OAuth2 client_id from NinjaOne Administration > Apps > API.

ninjaone_client_secret.title: NINJAONE_CLIENT_SECRET
ninjaone_client_secret.description: OAuth2 client_secret from NinjaOne Administration > Apps > API.

ninjaone_oauth_scope.title: NINJAONE_OAUTH_SCOPE
ninjaone_oauth_scope.description: Sets NINJAONE_OAUTH_SCOPE for the NinjaOne MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
